chunks.title: Introduction to the Oracle
chunks.reason: Sets the scene for the prophet's address against Mount Seir.

chunks.title: Judgment on Edom
chunks.reason: Details the specific destruction and desolation coming upon Mount Seir.

chunks.title: Reasons for Judgment
chunks.reason: Explains the historical enmity and arrogant claims that provoked God's anger.

chunks.title: Conclusion of Judgment
chunks.reason: Summarizes the punishment as a direct response to their delight in Israel's ruin.
